name: Jalapeño Cheddar Sourdough Bread
summary: A savory, spicy sourdough loaded with sharp cheddar and jalapeños.

ingredients.item: 40–60g sliced jalapeños (fresh or pickled; seeds removed for milder flavor)

tips: Want it cheesier? Add up to 150g cheddar, but be sure to drain any oil or moisture.
Want more heat? Leave in some fresh chilis or jalapeño seeds.

steps.title: Mix the Dough
steps.instruction: In a large bowl, mix the starter and water until mostly dissolved. Add the flour and stir until a shaggy dough forms. Cover and rest for 30–45 minutes.

steps.title: Add Salt
steps.instruction: Sprinkle salt over the dough and work it in using folding and pinching motions. Let rest for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Stretch & Folds
steps.instruction: During roughly the first 2 hours, perform 2–3 sets of stretch and folds — one set every 30–45 minutes. On the second or third set, gently add the cubed cheddar and sliced jalapeños, spreading them evenly through the dough. Reset the timer after each fold.
steps.tip: Add cheese and jalapeños on the 2nd or 3rd fold so they spread evenly.

steps.title: Bulk Fermentation
steps.instruction: After your folds, let the dough continue at room temperature until puffy and risen by about half — roughly 4–5 hours total from mixing.

steps.title: Pre-shape and Rest
steps.instruction: Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface. Shape into a round and let rest uncovered for 20–30 minutes.

steps.title: Final Shape
steps.instruction: Reshape into a tight ball and place seam side up in a floured proofing basket or a bowl lined with a floured cloth.

steps.title: Final Proof
steps.instruction: Let rise for 1–2 hours at room temperature, or cover and refrigerate overnight for 8–12 hours.

steps.title: Preheat & Bake
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C) with a Dutch oven inside for at least 30 minutes. Invert the dough onto parchment paper, score the top, and transfer to the hot pot. Bake covered for 25 minutes, then uncover and bake another 20–25 minutes until deep golden brown.

steps.title: Bake Uncovered
steps.instruction: Remove the lid and bake another 20–25 minutes until deep golden brown.

steps.title: Cool
steps.instruction: Transfer to a wire rack and cool completely — at least 1 hour — before slicing.
